LSE-HS9-L4-1400P-HSALG1-CMF-LAT-01 • HS Algebra I • Creating Equations and Inequalities in One and Two Variables

The Mission File

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to figure out?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the girl needs to determine, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what she says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what she will report back to her abuela.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS HSA-CED.A.1  |  HS Algebra I: Creating Equations and Inequalities
